name: SourceBrief EvoEmbedding temporal-memory 50Q eval
description: Structured temporal/memory eval for deciding whether EvoEmbedding-style retrieval is worth adopting in SourceBrief Retrieval V2. Placeholder IDs must be replaced with real imported resources before execution. The fixture contains ordered evidence markers so first/latest/changed-decision questions have explicit temporal ground truth.

collapses earlier and later decisions
